📖 README.md

@medyll/css-base

A modern CSS design system built with Chrome/Edge 125+ features:

  • @layer for cascade management
  • @container for component queries
  • :has() for parent selection
  • color-mix() and oklch() for colors
  • subgrid for nested layouts

Installation

npm install @medyll/css-base

Usage

import '@medyll/css-base/dist/app.css';

About

Modern CSS design system with semantic tokens and cascade layers.

css design-system modern-css container-queries
